hooks.description: [consolidated 2026-06-13] PostToolUse/Bash checks in ONE process. post_merge_cleanup (post gh pr merge), pr_open_monitor_arm (arm Monitor after pr create/ready).
Clear pending monitor-arm sentinel when Monitor fires with pr_monitor.py <N> or gh pr <view|checks> <N>
Block agent writes to the live checkout; linked worktree edits remain allowed. citation_grep_gate remains advisory.

hooks.command: python3 .claude/hooks/dispatch.py --multi invariant_test secrets_scan pre_merge_contamination cotenant_staging_guard maintree_git_state_guard pre_checkout_uncommitted_overlap pr_create_loc_accumulation pre_merge_comment_check pr_thread_reply_waste monitor_arm_overdue_advisor
hooks.description: [consolidated 2026-06-13] PreToolUse/Bash checks in ONE process. BLOCKING: maintree_git_state_guard rejects direct live Git mutation except verified cherry-pick; cotenant_staging_guard rejects broad staging in main; pr_create_loc_accumulation and pre_merge_comment_check protect the PR lane.
[workspace-routing-redesign S1] write-router: silent-route NEW files to canonical home via updatedInput; HARD-STOP cross-tenant worktree write. Write-only (never Edit). .claude/hooks/route_write.py
Advisory: phase-class subagent returns with tracked uncommitted changes -> commit reminder

RULE 1 guard (operator 2026-06-14): block + redirect when the final message concludes 'no edge'/'market efficient' — no-edge is OUR defect; root-cause the suppression, find other approaches. Bypass ZEUS_NO_EDGE_GUARD_OFF=1.
[2026-06-13] Hook-registry integrity self-test, once per session (moved off per-call module import for perf; B-fix)
After WorktreeCreate, emit naming policy + scope + sentinel write advisory
Before WorktreeRemove, emit pre-remove dirty/uncommitted check + branch closure suggestion
